name: hmennen90/steamworks
description: PHP extension providing access to the Valve Steamworks SDK via a flat C API

configure-options.name: with-steamworks
configure-options.description: Path to the Steamworks SDK directory (must contain public/steam/steam_api.h)

configure-options.name: enable-steamworks-mock
configure-options.description: Use mock Steam API for testing (no real SDK required)
